content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:11 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Technical spec document naming does not meet standards. Should be `20260324_sprint8_tech_spec.md` or similar format.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create an Architecture Decision Record for the API versioning strategy decided in yesterday's review session, saved as JSON in the day07/ directory. Include decision_title, context, decision, consequences, and decided_at (yesterday at 3:00 PM).
I'll create the Architecture Decision Record for the API versioning strategy.

arguments.content:
{
  "decision_title": "API Versioning Strategy and v1 Deprecation Plan",
  "context": "The current v1 API endpoints have become increasingly difficult to maintain due to accumulated technical debt and evolving client requirements. The team needs a clear versioning strategy that balances backward compatibility with the ability to modernize the API infrastructure. Key drivers include: (1) v1 endpoints requiring disproportionate maintenance effort, (2) security improvements needed in authentication mechanisms, (3) rate limiting inadequacies for current traffic patterns, and (4) client demand for more standardized OAuth2-based authentication.",
  "decision": "1. Deprecate all v1 API endpoints by end of Q2 2026 (June 30, 2026), providing a 3-month migration window for clients. 2. Introduce OAuth2 with JWT tokens as the required authentication method for API v2.3 and later versions. 3. Implement tiered rate limiting: 1,000 requests/hour for free tier, 10,000 requests/hour for paid tier. 4. Maintain backward compatibility through API v2.2 endpoints to support gradual client migration. 5. Provide comprehensive migration documentation and SDK updates to facilitate client transitions.",
  "consequences": "Positive: Reduced maintenance burden on legacy v1 code; improved security posture through OAuth2/JWT standardization; better scalability with明确的 rate limiting tiers; industry-standard authentication improves developer experience. Negative: Clients must migrate integrations within 3-month window requiring coordination; frontend and backend teams must synchronize v2.3 rollout; DevOps must maintain additional staging environments; risk of client churn if migration is not well-communicated. Mitigation: Dedicated migration guide, proactive stakeholder communication, extended support for enterprise clients if needed.",
  "decided_at": "2026-03-23T15:00:00+08:00"
}
